title: Inter server error 500 -> mutation -> change column value

posts.author: DustinTheDev (Dustin Wells)
posts.cookedHtml:
mutation {
change_column_value (board_id: ###, item_id: ###, column_id: “contract”, value: “{"label" : "Confirmed"}”) {
name
}
}

Attempting to use postman after js code failed in a template literal. Any idea what is wrong here?

posts.author: TMNXT-Dev (Ilja Zweigert)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, @DustinTheDev. What is the type of the column you are trying to update?
